headline: BXP Secures 320K Sq.Ft. Lease With Boston Dynamics at Reservoir Place
summary: BXP signs a long-term 320,000-square-foot lease with Boston Dynamics at Reservoir Place. This represents one of Greater Boston's largest innovation office deals this year.
